personalInfo.name: Srajan Sohani
personalInfo.bio: I am a software developer with a passion for building scalable web applications and solving complex problems. I love working with modern technologies and continuously learning.

education.school: Shri Govindram Seksariya Institute Of Technology and Sciences, Indore

Design and implement Data Quality (DQ) validation workflows for regulatory and compliance-critical datasets
Build Angular components for monitoring data health, feed integrity, and quality metrics
Collaborate with engineering and compliance teams to strengthen enterprise data governance.

Developed features and fixed 50+ bugs in internal CRM/HRIS tools using React and Redux.
Migrated to functional components, reducing maintenance by 10+ hrs/week and improving performance.
Implemented debounced search, API caching, and infinite scroll, cutting server load by 25%.
Added notification system via Service Workers + Firebase, boosting interactivity by 20%.

publications.title: Towards Understanding Deep Neural Networks in the Context of Agentic AI

projects.title: SEAMLESS UPGRADE TOOL
projects.description: A robust, containerized Java and React application built for automating and managing the seamless, one-click upgrade of on-premise Elasticsearch clusters. It features a real-time monitoring dashboard for tracking cluster health and integrates deeply with Ansible playbooks for zero-downtime node migrations.
projects.caseStudy:
### The Challenge
Upgrading on-premise Elasticsearch clusters is a traditionally fragile, manual process prone to human error and unacceptable downtime. Organizations need a way to perform rolling upgrades securely and efficiently.

### The Solution
During my internship at Hyperflex, I engineered the **Seamless Upgrade Tool**. Built with a robust Java (Spring Boot) backend and an interactive React dashboard, this containerized tool serves as a centralized orchestrator for node upgrades.

### Key Technical Achievements

- **Ansible Automation:** The Java backend integrates tightly with Ansible playbooks, executing rolling upgrades sequentially across individual nodes.
- **Real-Time Monitoring UI:** The React dashboard consumes live metrics via WebSocket, visualizing cluster health, shard allocation, and live upgrade statuses.
- **Zero-Downtime Design:** The tool automates critical shard routing and index management tasks right before taking a node offline, ensuring zero data loss and constant cluster availability.

projects.title: ONLINE-CODING-PLATFORM
projects.description: A comprehensive, high-performance coding platform featuring a React frontend and a robust Node.js backend. It supports real-time code execution, problem-solving environments, and competitive contests. The architecture leverages RabbitMQ for asynchronous compiler communication and Redis for rapid, real-time submission polling.
projects.caseStudy:
### The Challenge
Building a fully-functional competitive coding platform requires executing un-trusted user code securely while maintaining incredibly low latencies under high request loads (like during a live coding contest).

### The Architecture
I designed a highly scalable system divided into three main components: a **React Frontend**, a **Main Express API**, and an isolated **Compiler Worker**. 

### Technical Highlights

- **Message Queueing with RabbitMQ:** To handle a surge of code submissions without crashing the main API, submissions are offloaded to a RabbitMQ message queue.
- **Caching & Real-Time Polling:** Redis is used as an ultra-fast in-memory data store. The frontend polls Redis to get real-time compiler execution results with minimal latency.
- **Secure Execution Environment:** The worker executes code securely, isolating environments to prevent malicious code from accessing the host OS.

projects.title: GPT FROM SCRATCH
projects.description: A comprehensive rebuild of a GPT-style language model from the ground up. Moving beyond basic reproduction, this project explores advanced LLM architectures through custom implementations of transformer components like GELU activations, Layer Normalization, and varied attention mechanisms. Built entirely in Python with PyTorch.

projects.title: BLOG-THE-CHANGE
projects.description: An intelligent, automated DevOps tool built as a GitHub Action. It integrates Google's Gemini LLM with the Hashnode API to automatically analyze Git diffs and generate rich, context-aware blog posts summarizing code commits. Built using TypeScript and Octokit for seamless CI/CD workflow automation.

projects.title: VIRTUAL WORLD DRIVING CARS
projects.description: An interactive, browser-based driving simulation featuring custom 2D physics and visual rendering engines. Built entirely with vanilla JavaScript and the HTML5 Canvas API, demonstrating advanced concepts in game loops, kinematics, and spatial rendering.

projects.title: RETAIL PULSE IMAGE PROCESSING
projects.description: A highly concurrent image processing pipeline engineered in Go. Designed specifically for retail analytics, it rapidly processes bulk shelf imagery to identify product placements and extract insights using advanced computer vision techniques, capitalizing on Go's speed and goroutines.
